summary: List Work Order Contract detail line items
description: List Detail Line Items on a given Work Order Contract

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[line_item_id]
parameters.description: Line Item ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Line Item ID or within a range of Line Item IDs.

billed_to_date.description: Detail Line Item actual billed amount

billed_against.description: Has this line item ever been billed for a non-zero amount on a previous invoice

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity
